body_transformation: The plump rounded body silhouette remains intact, now covered in smooth electric-blue scales with vibrant yellow circuit-like patterns tracing the contours of the original leaf bulb. The curled spiral tail tip transforms into a jagged lightning-bolt shape with sparking yellow fur tips, while the pale cream underbelly adopts a matte electric-blue hue. Deep-set red eyes with white highlights glow faintly with energy, and the leaf-like appendage becomes a crystalline electric-blue bulb with neon green lightning veins. Small glowing cracks of electric blue energy appear along the spine where the original leaf texture was.
signature_feature: Back bulb: crystalline electric-blue with neon green lightning veins and sparking energy discharge.
